| 4 | Delete 4 items (click "Delete" 4 times) | ✅ 4 items removed |
| 5 | Verify 1 item remains | ✅ Exactly 1 item remaining |
| 6 | Close browser | ✅ Browser closed |
**FINAL_RESULT: PASS** ✅
The test passed successfully. We added 5 elements, deleted 4 of them, and confirmed that exactly 1 item remained on the page, which meets the pass criteria.
